items.title: TIL @cognition usage has ~DOUBLED globally since these 2 launches.
items.title_zh: 自这两次发布以来，TIL @cognition 在全球范围内的使用量增加了一倍。
items.description: TIL @cognition usage has ~DOUBLED globally since these 2 launches. people are finding all sorts of creative usecases when u can compose agents together and make them proactive. agent recursion is all you need? https://t.co/YGyuc5O1C0 https…
items.description_zh: 自这两次发布以来，TIL @cognition 在全球范围内的使用量增加了一倍。当你可以将代理组合在一起并让他们积极主动时，人们就会发现各种创造性的用例。代理递归就是您所需要的吗？ https://t.co/YGyuc5O1C0 https…

items.title: The thing I have to remind myself constantly with OpenClaw, Claude Code, and the like is…
items.title_zh: 我必须通过 OpenClaw、Claude Code 等不断提醒自己的是……
items.description: The thing I have to remind myself constantly with OpenClaw, Claude Code, and the like is am I actually setting up workflows to get real work done or am I just optimizing my OpenClaw and Claude Code setup. Very easy to just do the latter be…
items.description_zh: 对于 OpenClaw、Claude Code 等，我必须不断提醒自己的是，我实际上是在设置工作流程来完成实际工作，还是只是在优化我的 OpenClaw 和 Claude Code 设置。很容易做到后者……

items.title: I know OpenClaw isn't part of OpenAI but this feels like a mini-crisis for OpenAI if the…
items.title_zh: 我知道 OpenClaw 不是 OpenAI 的一部分，但这对 OpenAI 来说就像一场小型危机，如果......
items.description: I know OpenClaw isn't part of OpenAI but this feels like a mini-crisis for OpenAI if the GPT integration doesn't improve soon. The bar is GPT needs to be just as good if not better for OpenClaw as Opus. https://t.co/zTVCpzI3EQ
items.description_zh: 我知道 OpenClaw 不是 OpenAI 的一部分，但如果 GPT 集成不能很快得到改善，这对 OpenAI 来说就像是一场小危机。对于 OpenClaw 来说，GPT 的标准是与 Opus 一样好，甚至更好。 https://t.co/zTVCpzI3EQ

items.title: Most people are loose with what’s measurable and rigid with what’s inherently fuzzy.
items.title_zh: 大多数人对于可测量的东西比较宽松，而对于本质上模糊的东西则比较严格。
items.description: Most people are loose with what’s measurable and rigid with what’s inherently fuzzy. They bend data to fit the story, but demand precision from things that don’t survive contact with reality. LARPing rigor.
items.description_zh: 大多数人对于可测量的东西比较宽松，而对于本质上模糊的东西则比较严格。他们扭曲数据以适应故事，但要求那些无法与现实接触的事物具有精确性。 LARPing 的严谨性。
